title: Analysis of India’s Competitive Position in RCEP

summary.about: India’s trade competitiveness and exposure across the RCEP region after choosing not to join the agreement.
summary.audience: Indian trade negotiators, exporters and sector policymakers.
summary.method: Uses 2020 WITS trade data, revealed comparative advantage, export-intensity indicators and tariff comparisons.
summary.insights: India has strengths in services and several goods but weak export intensity, broad trade deficits and strong competition across RCEP markets.
